title: LEFT JOIN in view malfunctions with partial index on table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 DOUBLE PRECISION);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c1 TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL, 3.14);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t2(c1) WHERE c1 IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.c0 = t3.c0 WHERE t3.c1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with partial index on NULL values
